LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT ARSENIO MAGADIA FOR ORDER DISMISSING PLTF'S COMPLAINT FOR FAILURE TO OBEY THIS COURT'S PRIOR ORDERS AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS; OFF CALENDAR, MATTER RE-NOTICED FOR DEPT. 610. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; REPORTER JOYCE LONG # 8620

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO DISMISS THE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. THE COURT FINDS THAT FURTHER ORDERS WOULD BE INEFFECTIVE. THE REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. (610/BCHAN)
